name: Chocolate-Almond Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 unbaked pie shell in glass pie pan
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
In another bowl, combine melted butter, milk, and almond extract.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and beat until smooth.
Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
Pour the batter into the unbaked pie shell.
To make the sauce, melt chocolate in boiling water. Stir until completely dissolved.
Add sugar, butter, and chopped almonds to the melted chocolate mixture. Bring to a boil over low heat.
Remove from heat and stir in the remaining butter and almond extract.
Pour the sauce over the pie batter.
Sprinkle chopped almonds on top of the pie.
Bake for 55-60 minutes or until set.
Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate shavings before serving.
